creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
The MUSEEQ and QSA options of this port depend on the QT3 port, which expired on 2013-07-01. Remove these options from the Makefile.

Leave the MUSEEQ lines in pkg-plist (now always a comment) to ease a possible update to QT4.

Fix pkg-descr while here.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run 'make index' after locally removing the QT3/KDE3 ports.
